zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Goddard於1465年出生在英國維爾爾阿爾德布恩時，他的父親Walter Goddard40歲，母親Sybil Mychell Petit36歲。他於1510年與Elizabeth Berenger在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1545年3月10日在英國維爾爾格亞特 貝德享年80歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾格亞特 貝德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Goddard于1465年出生在英国維爾爾阿爾德布恩时，他的父亲Walter Goddard40岁，母亲Sybil Mychell Petit36岁。他于1510年与Elizabeth Berenger在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1545年3月10日在英国維爾爾格亞特 貝德享年80岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾格亞特 貝德。

nameMeanings.name: Goddard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Godhard, a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The name was popular in Europe during the Middle Ages as a result of the fame of Saint Gotthard, an 11th-century bishop of Hildesheim who founded a hospice on the pass from Switzerland to Italy that bears his name. This surname is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.
English: perhaps occasionally a variant of the occupational name   Gothard  . The two surnames may have been much confused.
French: variant of   Godard  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Gothard
meanings: English: occupational name for a keeper of goats, from Middle English gotherde (Old English gāt ‘goat’ + hierde) ‘herdsman, keeper’.

English: variant of Goater, with excrescent -d, either a topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or ditch, from Middle English gote ‘watercourse’ + the agent suffix -(e)r, or an occupational name either from Middle English gotherde ‘goatherd’ or from Middle English goter ‘goatherd’, an agent derivative of Middle English got(e) ‘goat’ (Old English gāt).

variants.name: Godard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Reynald, Alcide, Armand, Aurel, Celine, Cyprien, Dominique, Emile, Etienne, Euclide, Gilles.
French: from the personal name Godard, of ancient Germanic origin (see Goddard ).

English (of Norman origin): variant of   Goddard  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Goertz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Christoph, Erwin, Guenter, Juergen, Kurt, Otto.
German (also Görtz): patronymic from the personal name Goert, a short form of Godhard (see Goddard ), Gottfried or Gerhardt , common in Rhineland.
Germanized form (also Görtz) of Sorbian Gerc; see Gertz .

variants.name: Goodart
meanings: Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Gothard  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Goddard was born in 1465, in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England, his father, Walter Goddard, was 40 and his mother, Sybil Mychell Petit, was 36. He married Elizabeth Berenger in 1510, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 8 daughters. He died on 10 March 1545, in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Goddard est né en 1465, à Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Goddard, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sybil Mychell Petit, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Berenger en 1510, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1545, à Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Goddard 1465 in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Goddard 40 und seine Mutter Sybil Mychell Petit 36. Er hat 1510 in Wiltshire, England Elizabeth Berenger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 10. März 1545 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Goddard è nato il nel 1465 nel Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Walter Goddard, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Sybil Mychell Petit, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Berenger nel 1510, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 8 figlie. Morì il 10 marzo 1545, nel Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Goddardが1465年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアアルドボウルンで生まれた時，父Walter Goddardは40歳，母Sybil Mychell Petitは36歳であった。1510年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでElizabeth Berengerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年3月10日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアグレアト ベドウインで80歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアグレアト ベドウインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Goddard(이)가 1465년 영국 윌츠히르 알드보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Goddard(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil Mychell Petit(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1510년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Elizabeth Berenger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 3월 10일 영국 윌츠히르 그리트 베드w이에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 그리트 베드w이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Goddard nasceu em 1465, em Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Goddard, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Mychell Petit, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Berenger em 1510, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1545, em Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Goddard родился в 1465 г. в местности алдбурн, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Goddard было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Mychell Petit, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Berenger в 1510 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей. Он умер 10 марта 1545 г. в местности грит бедуин, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности грит бедуин, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Goddard nació en 1465, en Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Goddard, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Sybil Mychell Petit, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Berenger en 1510, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 8 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1545, en Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
